title: Adam Keighran
extract:
Adam Keighran (born 24 April 1997) is an Australian professional rugby league footballer who plays as a centre for the Wigan Warriors in the Betfred Super League.
He previously played for the New Zealand Warriors and the Sydney Roosters in the National Rugby League. Keighran also played for the Catalans Dragons in the Super League. Earlier in his career he played as a stand-off and hooker.
